svg.aria-label: JTM45 · turret board layout (derived) — redrawn board layout diagram
svg.text: Redrawn from Marshall JTM45 factory schematic ('Basic schematic for Marshall trem amps, types 1961, 1962, 1987/T') — layout derived from this schematic; no factory layout sheet located — not a trace
Note: the 6.3 V heater twisted pair always routes on the top layer and never joins another run — its crossings are not hop-overs.
